description_long: This skateboard features a classic popsicle-shaped deck with a smooth, black surface and slightly upturned nose and tail. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, visible along the thin edge, and is topped with a solid black grip tape for traction. Underneath, the skateboard is equipped with two sets of red wheels, likely made of polyurethane, attached to metal trucks that are mostly hidden from view. The wheels are of a standard street size, suitable for urban environments and tricks. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels. The skateboard is compact and lightweight, making it ideal for street skating, commuting, or performing tricks in parks and urban settings.
description: A classic, black skateboard with a wooden edge, red street wheels, and a minimalistic, unadorned deck. The design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban skating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, the wooden edge, and both red wheels beneath.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the width of the deck and the solid black grip tape surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the deck, wooden edge, and both red wheels.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, again showing the width and black grip tape surface.
attribute_wheel_type: street, red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: Standard trucks, mostly hidden, likely silver or metallic, standard mounting, no visible branding
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
